_comment: Per-topology DRC violation ceilings. 'errors' counts categories that rule_severities marks as errors (clearance, courtyards_overlap, drill_out_of_range, shorting_items, solder_mask_bridge, unconnected_items, etc.). 'warnings' counts the rest (silk_*, track_dangling, via_dangling). 'unconnected_pads' is the separate kicad-cli count. Lower as fixes land — never raise without a written reason.
_baseline_context: After fix commit 6dde53f (JLCPCB rules + zone fill). Starting point for the DRC ratchet.

buck_12v_to_5v.notes: 2 courtyards_overlap on LM2596+L1+R2. Silk warnings: 4 silk_over_copper, 1 silk_overlap, 1 track_dangling.

ldo_5v_to_3v3.notes: 2 courtyards_overlap from tight AMS1117 + cap spacing. 1 track_dangling warning from Freerouting.

esp32c3_breakout.notes: 1 courtyards_overlap, 2 shorting_items, 2 solder_mask_bridge — all from C3 cap overlapping U2 LDO pads. 1 unconnected pad. Silk warnings: 5 silk_over_copper, 2 silk_overlap, 2 silk_edge_clearance.

led_5v_20ma.notes: DRC-clean baseline. Any regression here is a real problem.
